description: Bug: Android login loop after latest update — high urgency, 3+ action items required

input.ticket_text: Every time I try to log in on my Android phone it just keeps looping back to the login screen. I enter my credentials, it loads for a second, then resets. I've cleared cache and data, reinstalled twice. Galaxy S23, Android 14, game version 5.1.0. This started after today's update.

notes: At least 3 action items: reproduce, check logs, assess rollback. Device info (Galaxy S23, Android 14) must appear in team_summary.
